spec.title: CPU Mode Mix
spec.description: CPU time split by mode.

spec.title: Load Average per Core
spec.description: Normalized load; near 1.0 means runnable work equals available cores.

spec.title: CPU I/O Wait and Steal
spec.description: Highlights storage wait and hypervisor scheduling pressure.

spec.title: Memory Used by Instance
spec.description: Memory utilization by instance.

spec.title: Memory Breakdown
spec.description: Used, available, and cache/buffer memory by instance.

spec.title: Major Page Faults
spec.description: Sustained major page faults can indicate memory pressure.

spec.title: Swap Used
spec.description: Usually blank or zero on EKS Linux nodes.

spec.title: Filesystem Used
spec.description: Filesystem utilization by node and mountpoint.

spec.title: Filesystem Inodes Used
spec.description: Inode exhaustion can break nodes before bytes run out.

spec.title: Nodes Scraped
spec.description: Unique node-exporter instances matching the filters.

spec.title: Filesystem Available
spec.description: Available bytes by filesystem.

spec.title: Disk Read / Write Throughput
spec.description: Disk throughput by instance.

spec.title: Disk IOPS
spec.description: Read and write operations per second.

spec.title: Busiest Disk Utilization
spec.description: Percent of time the busiest block device is servicing I/O.

spec.title: Disk Latency
spec.description: Average read/write latency with denominator clamped to avoid divide-by-zero spikes.

spec.title: Top Filesystems Now
spec.description: Instant table of filesystem usage. Sort by Value in Grafana.

spec.title: Network Throughput
spec.description: Receive/transmit throughput by instance for selected devices.

spec.title: Network Errors and Drops
spec.description: Sustained errors or drops need investigation.

spec.title: TCP Sockets and Conntrack
spec.description: Socket and conntrack pressure by instance.

spec.title: Average CPU Busy
spec.description: Average CPU utilization across selected instances.

spec.title: Pods per Node Capacity
spec.description: Pods scheduled as a percentage of allocatable pod capacity.

spec.title: Pod CPU Usage by Node
spec.description: Aggregate container CPU usage by Kubernetes node.

spec.title: Pod Memory Working Set by Node
spec.description: Aggregate container memory working set by Kubernetes node.

spec.title: Node Conditions
spec.description: Ready=true is expected; pressure conditions=true need attention.

spec.title: Node Inventory
spec.description: Node metadata from kube-state-metrics: kernel, OS, kubelet, runtime, internal IP, provider ID.

spec.title: Average Memory Used
spec.description: Average memory utilization using MemAvailable.

spec.title: Max Filesystem Used
spec.description: Worst filesystem utilization among selected nodes and mountpoints.

spec.title: RX + TX Throughput
spec.description: Aggregate network throughput for selected network devices.

spec.title: Nodes Not Ready
spec.description: Kubernetes readiness from kube-state-metrics.

spec.title: CPU Busy by Instance
spec.description: Per-instance CPU utilization.
